Atty. BRIAN D. SHAFFER, Esq. of Miller Starr Regalia (Tel: 925-935-9400) for petitioners;
Atty. RICHARD E. ROBINSON, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3954) for respondent City and County of San Francisco.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioners' petition for writ of administrative mandamus is denied.
